bug_report.summary: New Entry dialog default size/layout changed significantly (much narrower; leaves large unused area)
steps_to_reproduce: Go to Library → Add entry using… (opens the “New Entry” dialog).
expected_behaviors: The “New Entry” dialog should open with the same default size/geometry as before (no major, unexpected shrink that leaves large unused space).
actual_behaviors: After the change, the “New Entry” dialog opens substantially narrower than before, leaving a large blank area of the main window visible on the right; recommended-type buttons reflow (e.g., “Misc” shifts position) due to the reduced width.

bug_report.summary: New Entry dialog: Recommended types layout broken (blank type button; 'Misc' appears displaced/duplicated)
steps_to_reproduce: Open the “New Entry” dialog (e.g., Add entry).
expected_behaviors: Each recommended entry type is shown as a single labeled button (e.g., Article, Book, InProceedings, TechReport, Misc).
actual_behaviors: The “Recommended types” area shows a small blank/unnamed button on the right, while “Misc” appears in an unexpected position (stacked under/near “Article”), suggesting the type buttons are mis-laid out or duplicated.

bug_report.summary: Clean up entries dialog shows an empty/blank button placeholder where the old “Apply” button used to be
steps_to_reproduce: Observe the bottom-left area of the dialog (below the dropdown controls).
expected_behaviors: With the streamlined UI, the old per-tab “Apply” control should be removed cleanly (no leftover button/placeholder).
Only the intended buttons should be visible (e.g., “Clean up” and “Cancel”).
actual_behaviors: A small empty/unlabeled bordered rectangle (looks like a blank button/placeholder) is visible at the bottom-left of the dialog, suggesting the old “Apply” control is not fully removed or its label is missing.

false_positive_reasons: LLM hallucination — misinterpreted or imagined GUI rendering

bug_report.summary: Left sidebar panes reorder after change: “Web search” appears above “Groups” (and controls reposition)
steps_to_reproduce: Enable overriding application font size and set it to 18pt, then Save
Observe the left sidebar in the main window
expected_behaviors: The left sidebar pane order should remain consistent (Groups pane above Web search, as before)
Associated controls (search/filter fields and buttons such as “Add group”) should remain within their respective pane areas and not shift unexpectedly
actual_behaviors: The left sidebar shows “Web search” above “Groups” (swapped compared to before)
Controls within these panes appear rearranged/repositioned (e.g., search/filter fields and “Add group” placement differs), indicating a sidebar layout regression at large font size

bug_report.summary: About dialog: No visible confirmation/notification after clicking “Copy Version” (missing “Copied version to clipboard” message)
steps_to_reproduce: Set application font override to 18pt and apply (as in scenario)
expected_behaviors: A confirmation message/notification is shown indicating the version was copied to the clipboard (e.g., “Copied version to clipboard”), as in the before build
actual_behaviors: No confirmation message/notification is visible after clicking “Copy Version” in the after build

bug_report.summary: Clean up entries dialog column header is truncated at 20pt font ("Field na…")
steps_to_reproduce: Enable overriding the application font size and set it to 20 pt; apply changes.
Create/open any library and select an entry.
expected_behaviors: Dialog layout scales so labels/headers are readable (e.g., column header shows full "Field name"), without truncation at the default dialog size.
actual_behaviors: The left column header is truncated and displayed as "Field na…" in the opened dialog.

bug_report.summary: "…" (ellipsis) button present in old Clean up entries dialog is missing in new dialog
expected_behaviors: Any previously available dialog control (the ellipsis/overflow "…" button) remains available, unless explicitly replaced by an equivalent control elsewhere.
actual_behaviors: The "…" button visible in the previous UI (bottom-right area of the dialog) is no longer present in the updated dialog.

false_positive_reasons: Expected GUI difference due to intended code change
